title: audit.first_run.completed
description: Audit event emitted when the first-run wizard is successfully completed. Routed directly through crates/audit/ — this is NOT a spec 002 lifecycle transition event (R-E2). The event is append-only and must not be updated or deleted.

completed_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the wizard was marked complete.

source_count_by_kind.description: Count of RegisteredSource rows per kind at completion time.

raw.description: Count of raw sources. Always >= 1 (required by firstrun.complete).

project.description: Count of project sources. Always >= 1 (required by firstrun.complete, R-Wiz-2).
